focus: Aside packet design, bdg contrast, and UTCP registration

text: The copy-ready Aside manual is a local stdio mcp template with command aside and args [mcp], matching existing UTCP manual_call_templates.
Aside maps navigation, DOM, and screenshots through one REPL/Playwright code surface; bdg provides direct CLI/CDP helpers, while Aside console/network parity remains an unverified capability probe.
After registering manual aside, repository convention derives the expected Code Mode callable as aside.aside_repl, but discovery must confirm it at runtime.
Treating Aside as a CDP-domain-complete replacement for bdg.
reason: The live MCP inventory exposes one repl tool and does not verify a separate CDP catalog.
